category_sources: Official Yubico docs describe Yubico PIV Tool as managing PIV functions on YubiKey smart cards.
source_facts.description says it is a command-line tool for the YubiKey PIV application.
display_name_sources: Official Yubico docs title the product Yubico PIV Tool.
source_facts.name is yubico-piv-tool, the CLI/package name.
docs_sources: Official developers.yubico.com page is the project homepage from source_facts.homepage.
Official docs.yubico.com page is the Yubico PIV Tool User Guide.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository https://github.com/Yubico/yubico-piv-tool identifies itself as the command-line tool for the YubiKey PIV application.
Official Yubico developer pages link the tool to GitHub source/releases.
tags_sources: Official Yubico docs describe PIV, PKCS#11, smart-card, and YubiKey management functionality.
source_facts.description identifies YubiKey PIV command-line use.
